title: Do not ignore infra command from config files
body:
It looks like this was previously removed because the default hard-coded `/pause` so we would never take into account the image config. I've removed the default in c/common and re-added support to check config files.

While we're at it, fix ENTRYPOINT support - we should not be setting this if we got ENTRYPOINT from the image.

Fixes https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1853455

@rhatdan Do we have tests for containers.conf where we modify it and verify the changes took place? And if so, where do they live, so I can add another one for this?

LGTM
but definitely want someone with more infra knowledge than I to look too.
Tests failures are just flakes, @containers/podman-maintainers PTAL
